goals.title: Repo security hardening
goals.objective: Review high-risk command execution, autonomy file writes, Git operations, and background worktree handling in codex-auto, then fix any real boundary issues.
success_criteria: Confirmed the high-risk safety boundaries or fixed the specific issues found.
scripts/verify.ps1 passes after the hardening changes.
constraints: Do not auto push, deploy, or merge unrelated work.
out_of_scope: New product features unrelated to safety hardening.

goals.title: Productize codex-autonomy for repo installation
goals.objective: Upgrade codex-auto into an installable codex-autonomy product with goal queue intake, proposal confirmation, sprint and cruise run modes, reviewer and reporter flows, and codex/autonomy commit gating.
success_criteria: codex-autonomy install scaffolds the upgraded repo control plane into a target repository.
The CLI supports install, intake-goal, approve-proposal, set-run-mode, review, report, pause, resume, and merge-autonomy-branch.
Automation prompts cover planner, worker, reviewer, reporter, and sprint runner flows.
The root repo control plane mirrors the same v2 contract and passes verify plus tests.
constraints: Keep the control plane inside the repo.
Do not touch internal Codex databases or automation storage.
Allow commits only on codex/autonomy; do not auto push, PR, or deploy.
out_of_scope: Automatic push, PR creation, or deployment.
Direct manipulation of private Codex app internals.

goals.title: System audit and hardening
goals.objective: 检查当前 codex-auto 的安全性、健壮性、可用性与上手难度、扩展性，形成问题清单并逐项修复高优先级问题。
success_criteria: 按安全性、健壮性、可用性与上手难度、扩展性输出问题清单
修复高优先级安全或数据一致性问题
修复高优先级健壮性或流程阻断问题
改进至少一项可用性或上手难度问题
所有改动通过 scripts/verify.ps1 与必要回归测试
constraints: 只修改必要源文件和 autonomy/*，不触碰未公开 Codex 内部接口
保持 Windows 原生 PowerShell、本地 Git 与 background worktree 方案
out_of_scope: 不接入私有 automation 存储
